user.title: Discover public datasets
user.description: Enter an institution's public data portal URL. Open Data will prepare and cache the site structure. Large catalogs and CSV/JSON files can take several minutes to download; you can leave this screen and return later without affecting regular Home Assistant updates.

discover.title: Choose discovered datasets
discover.description: Site preparation is complete. Found {count} ranked datasets on {portal} using {provider}. Selecting a large CSV or JSON file may take another minute while its fields and update frequency are prepared and cached.

prepare.title: Prepare site catalog
prepare.description: Preparing the site catalog in the background. Large catalogs and file resources can take several minutes. You may close this dialog and return later; no entities or regular downloads begin until you select and configure a dataset.

progress.prepare_catalog: Inspecting the portal, cataloguing datasets, and saving the catalog for later selection

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the portal.
error.invalid_dataset: The portal or selected dataset is invalid.
error.no_datasets: No suitable queryable datasets were discovered on this portal.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This open data resource is already configured.

init.title: Choose useful dataset fields
init.description: Dataset structure: {kind}. Automatic suggestions are preselected. Every category is an optional multi-select and may be empty. A field can appear in only one category; fields omitted from every category are ignored.

structure.title: Define units and records
structure.description: Combine selected fields into stable units and observations. Hierarchies are optional. Within each hierarchy set, select fields from largest/broadest to smallest/most specific; independent nested systems belong in separate sets. A record name may be used as its key.

records.title: Choose records and metrics
records.description: Record choices were rebuilt using {identity} as the identity for this {kind} dataset. Historical observation IDs should not be selected as locations.

error.invalid_field_roles: A field can belong to only one category. Remove any duplicate selection and try again.
